exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1324, 44). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.102) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [7ae3883e8f0cca2aaa5f7d142cb64c3c, clickElement {id=f.0EDC1B73ACF35F20D2FEC7E39E3EFD63.d.E0F4F486E7C58FB809A4C945A61C2896.e.129}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 150.0.7871.102, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 150.0.7871.115 (25f5b661e5b..., userDataDir: C:\Users\VIKRAM\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:61000}, goog:processID: 13752, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:61000/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 150.0.7871.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (7ae3883e8f0cca2aaa5f7d142cb64c3c)] -> xpath: //img[@class='profile-avatar']] Session ID: 7ae3883e8f0cca2aaa5f7d142cb64c3c
